prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约25226→45332→24444→27214→30812名，2022年因试卷难度变化出现异常高位次，2023–2025年整体呈后移趋势，2025年基准约30812名；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年91人→2022年79人→2023年83人→2024年115人→2025年172人→2026年228人，2026年较2025年大幅扩招约32.6%，招生名额增加显著，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第113名→2022年第113名→2023年第107名→2024年第108名→2025年第103名→2026年第97名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力获认可；2022年声誉周期内该校曾出现偏负面舆情（郑强书记管理受批评），但近年已无显著负面信号；抖音热度总排名第63位，评价为"一般"，综合热度约48.9万，短视频平台曝光度中等；投档异常文件中未出现该校，说明近年无断档或暴跌记录，报考心理较为稳定；第五轮学科评估中化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A类学科；机械工程、材料科学与工程、电气工程等传统工科实力较强，与招生专业中的化学工程与工艺、材料科学与工程、电气工程及其自动化等高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年电气工程及其自动化获评"高热推荐"），与该校优势工科方向契合；河南省2026年普通高考考生总数约120万人（较2025年约90.7万大幅增加约32%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，与河南省相邻，属于中部地区高校，对河南考生具有天然的地缘吸引力；该校在河南的招生计划逐年大幅增加，2026年物理类计划228人，占比较高，反映出对河南生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次30812名、2026年大幅扩招约32.6%带来的位次后移效应、河南省考生总数大幅增加约32%带来的竞争加剧效应，以及软科排名持续上升（第97名）对学校吸引力的正面影响；预测2026年物理类最低位次约36880名，区间36380–37380名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间36380–37380名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（电子信息、自动化、通信、软件工程等热门工科），一档试验班专业（电气试验班、计算机试验班）作为冲刺，三档专业（安全工程、化工、土木等）作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（36380名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（37380名附近）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 25226 → 45332 → 24444 → 27214 → 30812 respectively. In 2022, an abnormal high ranking occurred due to changes in exam difficulty. From 2023 to 2025, the overall trend shows a backward shift, with the 2025 baseline around 30812. The university's enrollment plan in Henan Province for Science/Physics Category: 2021: 91 → 2022: 79 → 2023: 83 → 2024: 115 → 2025: 172 → 2026: 228. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is a significant expansion of about 32.6%, with a notable increase in enrollment slots, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising in recent years: 2021: 113th → 2022: 113th → 2023: 107th → 2024: 108th → 2025: 103rd → 2026: 97th. The ranking is steadily improving, and the university's comprehensive strength is recognized. During the 2022 reputation cycle, the university experienced some negative public opinion (criticism of Secretary Zheng Qiang's management), but in recent years there have been no significant negative signals. Douyin heat total ranking is 63rd, rated as "average", with a comprehensive heat of about 489,000, indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms. The university did not appear in the abnormal admission files, indicating no recent gaps or sharp drops in admission, and the application psychology is relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A-class discipline of the university. Traditional engineering disciplines such as Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Electrical Engineering are relatively strong, highly corresponding to the admission majors like Chemical Engineering and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, and Electrical Engineering and Automation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity (in 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as "highly recommended"), aligning with the university's advantageous engineering fields. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (a significant increase of about 32% from about 907,000 in 2025), leading to intensified competition. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi Province, adjacent to Henan Province, and is a central region university, naturally attractive to Henan candidates due to geographical proximity. The university's enrollment plan in Henan has been increasing significantly year by year, with 228 slots in the Physics Category in 2026, accounting for a relatively high proportion, reflecting the emphasis on Henan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 30812, the backward shift effect due to the significant expansion of about 32.6% in 2026, the intensified competition effect from the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in Henan Province, and the positive impact of the continuously rising Soft Science ranking (97th) on the university's attractiveness; the predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is about 36880, with a range of 36380–37380.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Experimental Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (Experimental Class)
- Robotics Engineering (Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Automation
- Communication Engineering
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Safety Engineering
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Civil Engineering
- Mining Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 36380–37380, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Automation, Communication, Software Engineering, etc., popular engineering fields) as the main direction, Tier 1 experimental class majors (Electrical Experimental Class, Computer Experimental Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Safety Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc.) as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 36380), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 37380), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 4834 → 4934 → 4867 → 4869 → 4916, with rankings highly stable in the 4830–4940 range over the past five years, showing minimal fluctuation (only about 100 places). The 2025 baseline is approximately 4916. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province: 2021: 10 students → 2022: 10 → 2023: 10 → 2024: 10 → 2025: 12 → 2026: 8. In 2026, enrollment decreases by about 33.3% compared to 2025, with a significant reduction in spots, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science ranking has been rising in recent years, reaching 97th in 2026, with steadily improving comprehensive strength. In 2022, there was some negative public opinion (criticism of Secretary Zheng Qiang's management), but there have been no significant negative signals in recent years. Douyin popularity is average. No abnormal admission records, stable application psychology. Chemical Engineering and Technology A- is the only A-class discipline, with no direct relevance to liberal arts majors. Liberal arts majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education, Public Administration, Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages) lack corresponding A-class discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity (recommended), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, and liberal arts majors overall have medium-to-high popularity. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from about 907,000 in 2025), intensifying competition. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi, adjacent to Henan, offering geographical appeal to Henan students. The liberal arts enrollment plan is small (8 students), leading to concentrated competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4916, the ranking advancement effect due to the approximately 33.3% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the intensified competition effect from the significant increase in total Henan examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 is approximately 3953, with a range of 3453–4453.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Public Administration
- Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3453–4453, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Ideological and Political Education as the main direction, with Tier 1 Law and Accounting as reach options (consider if ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range), and Tier 3 Public Administration and Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages as safety choices. Due to the liberal arts enrollment plan of only 8 students, competition is concentrated. Candidates are advised to position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
